hypotheses.name: kNN lineage community purity at L2 vs L11
hypotheses.method: k=10 nearest-neighbor purity for in-vocab lineage markers (B-cell n=3, T-cell n=2, Myeloid n=1, NK n=1) at layers 0/2/5/8/11. Null: 500 label-shuffle permutations on cycle4_immune [12,4941,512].
hypotheses.result_value: purity=0.214 flat across all layers; null=0.214; p=0.958
hypotheses.next_action: Retire this variant. Underpowered: 1 Myeloid + 1 NK gene can never have same-lineage neighbors. Revive only with expanded in-vocab marker sets (>3 per lineage) or modularity-based graph test on full kNN graph.
hypotheses.retirement_reason: Fundamentally underpowered: n=1 for Myeloid and NK lineages makes same-lineage proximity impossible. Method is valid but test is not meaningful with current vocab coverage.

hypotheses.name: Full-manifold TwoNN intrinsic dimensionality across 12 layers
hypotheses.method: TwoNN estimator (Facco et al. 2017) on n=2000 randomly sampled gene vectors from all 4941 genes at each layer. Nulls: Gaussian 512D raw (ID=122.97), Gaussian unit-sphere (ID=135.53), L11 feature-shuffled (ID=18.05). cycle4_immune embeddings [12,4941,512].
hypotheses.primary_metric: ID estimate per layer and delta L0->L11
hypotheses.next_action: Validate with bootstrap resampling across different n_samples (1000, 1500, 2000) to confirm stability. Extend to cycle1 and cycle4_seed43/44 for cross-run consistency. Also compute ID for functional gene subsets (B-cell markers, TFs) embedded in the full manifold context.

hypotheses.name: TCR signaling circuit convergence to T-cell identity centroid (CD247 confound removed)
hypotheses.method: T-cell centroid = CD247/CD8A/RUNX3 (no signaling overlap). Circuit = CD28/LCK. Rank of circuit genes to centroid at each of 12 layers. Null: 200 random 2-gene sets. cycle4_immune [12,4941,512].
hypotheses.primary_metric: mean rank change L0->L11 and null p-value
hypotheses.result_value: Rank L0=300.5, L11=78.5, change=-222.0. CD28: 595->86 (L6 minimum)->149. LCK: always rank 5-8. Null mean=-15.6 p=0.320.
hypotheses.next_action: CD28 trajectory (595->86->149) is the signal; LCK proximity is constant (ceiling effect). Extend to AP1 components (FOS/JUN if in vocab) as T-cell centroid, or use larger signaling circuit panel. Single-gene (CD28) story needs corroboration from a second gene.
